heading: Aviation designations: naval flight officer
label: 8218 Aviation designations: naval flight officer
text: Any officer of the naval service may be designated a naval flight officer if he has successfully completed the course prescribed for naval flight officers.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6024(par. 3).34 U.S.C. 735(par. 3), .June 24, 1926, ch. 668, § 344 Stat. 767The phrase “by competent authority” is omitted as surplusage. The definition form of is not followed.34 U.S.C. 735
